parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  fields: {
    'Platform':       $json.platform,
    'Content Type':   $json.contentType || 'auto',
    'Agent':          ($json.platform.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + $json.platform.slice(1)) + ' Agent',
    'Hook':           $json.hook,
    'Caption':        $json.post || $json.caption || '',
    'Hashtags':       $json.hashtags || '',
    'Script':         $json.script || '',
    'Slides (JSON)':  $json.slides ? JSON.stringify($json.slides) : '',
    'Visual Prompt':  $json.visualPrompt || '',
    'First Comment':  $json.firstComment || '',
    'Trend Reference':$json.trendReference || '',
    'Viral Score':    $json.viralScore || 0,
    'Notes':          $json.notes || '',
    'Status':         'generating',
    'Generated At':   new Date().toISOString()
  }
}) }}
